title: exaporeomai #1820
definition:
1) to be utterly at loss, be utterly destitute of measures or
    resources, to renounce all hope, be in despair
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to be utterly at loss, be utterly destitute of measures or
    resources, to renounce all hope, be in despair

    NASB:  to be utterly at a loss, be in despair:
